title: Virginia: Virginia Consumer Data Protection Act (VCDPA) deletion
summary: Virginia residents can request deletion of the personal data a business holds and opt out of its sale and targeted advertising. Unlike California, Virginia does not provide a general authorized-agent route for all request types, so you will usually submit deletion requests yourself.
disclaimer: General information, not legal advice, and not yet independently reviewed — verify the current process and your eligibility before relying on it.
